description: Graphic with White House branding. The top portion is a darkened photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark navy suit, white turtleneck or shirt and red tie with an American flag pin, pointing toward the viewer, mouth closed, against a dim interior with warm overhead lights and a large skeleton (an interior resembling a museum). Centered below in large bold white serif all caps is the text 'AMERICANS FIRST.' Beneath that is a white panel containing a line chart titled 'Total Native-Born Employment Level' with a legend labeling 'Biden Administration' (blue line) and 'Trump Administration (so far)' (red line). The x-axis runs Nov. 2023 through Nov. 2025 with a dashed vertical line labeled 'Inauguration'; the y-axis is total employment in thousands (129,000 to 134,000). The blue line segment is flat to declining; the red line segment rises after the inauguration mark. A dark footer bar reads 'THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON' with the round White House seal below. The tweet text reads 'The Biden administration CRUSHED the American Dream for American-born Workers... we're reversing this trend.'
notable_text: AMERICANS FIRST. | Total Native-Born Employment Level | Biden Administration / Trump Administration (so far) | Inauguration | THE WHITE HOUSE
